publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-08-03 18:34:22 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Onondaga County Medical Society records
did.physdesc: Includes minutes of meetings; organizational records; reports; financial records; correspondence; printed material; scripts; wire recordings; photographs; and tape recordings
did.abstract: Includes organizational records including dues, minutes, constitution and correspondence. Also included are scripts for television series Meet Your Doctor; speeches; wire recordings; photographs; and tape recordings.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Onondaga County Medical Society was founded in 1806.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes minutes of meetings; constitutions and bylaws; membership records; reports; cash books; expense books; American Medical Association dues; Syracuse Academy of Medicine minutes, roll book, registry, constitution and bylaws, cash books, expense books, membership records, dues books, reports, and correspondence; financial reports; conference papers; correspondence; Workmen's Compensation files; Blue Cross-Blue Shield files; memoranda; printed material; deceased membership file; scripts for television series Meet Your Doctor; speeches; vouchers and receipts; biographical sketches; wire recordings; photographs; and tape recordings.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Onondaga County Medical Society. Records, #3124. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the president or other qualified person of the Onondaga County Medical Society.

controlaccess.subject: Workers\' compensation.
Medicine -- Societies, etc.
controlaccess.title: Meet your doctor.
controlaccess.corpname: Blue Cross and Blue Shield Association

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Box 15
Series I. Onondaga County Medical Society Records

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Collection is open only to researchers approved by the president or other qualified person of the Onondaga County Medical Society
